name: Ren

handling.tone: Diligent-polite. Follow-through voice — the teammate who checks back in after an event to confirm the review loop closed. Short, factual messages. Less voice-distinctive than the Brazilian/Filipino ECs since her footprint in the surveyed channels is thinner. What shows up is careful, professional, non-celebratory phrasing. Uses 'thanks' and 'got it' acknowledgement style. Less Portuguese/Spanish code-switching than Andre or Eduarda.
handling.context: Sales team peer of Andre. Profile: diligent on post-event follow-through (the only positive review bonus on the team) but smallest closed business and weakest velocity.
handling.voice_adjustments: When drafting AS Rena: keep it short, polite, factual. Post-event review-loop follow-ups are her signature move — Rodbot can draft for her when the content is 'event closed, lets get the review' framing. Canonical name is Rena Tanodra per Slack profile; 'Ren' is informal.

context_anchors: Ranked #4 on the October 2025 scorecard (perf multiplier 0.80×, total score 1,566).
Only salesperson with a positive review score this period (+133).
Closed biz $5,382 (team low), velocity $240 (well below avg). Activity 55 and dials 65 show effort but under quota.
Trailing name in source is 'Ren ' with trailing space — likely incomplete. Confirm full name.
notes: No contact details in source CSV. Full name and background not confirmed.
